title: Implement transcript_3 helper with proper CBOR encoding for TH_3
description: Add fn transcript_3(th_2: &[u8; 32], ciphertext_2_or_plaintext: &[u8], id_cred_r: &[u8]) -> Result<[u8; 32], EdhocError> that builds H(CBOR(TH_2) || CBOR(CIPHERTEXT_2) || CBOR(ID_CRED_R)) using canonical CBOR. Match Python edhoc.py and test vectors. Update callsites in EdhocInitiator and EdhocResponder.
